note: LG이노텍 PoC tenant 카탈로그 — 광학솔루션(카메라모듈/3D센싱), 패키지솔루션(FC-BGA/포토마스크/OLED 마스크), 모빌리티솔루션(자율주행 센서/EV 파워모듈) 양산 라인 안전관리. SafeMate 본체 manufacturing.json을 LG 사업 맥락으로 교체. 클린룸 화학물질 폭로, SMT 솔더 흄, 자동화 협착, 광학장비 레이저, 진공 흡착, ESD 충격, 분진(마스크 가공)을 핵심 위험으로 다룸. 5 work_types × baseline 3~5개. regulation은 산업안전보건기준규칙·화학물질관리법·KOSHA GUIDE 인용 기반(felix 검수 권장).

OPTICAL_MODULE_ASSEMBLY.label_vi: Dây chuyền lắp ráp mô-đun camera
OPTICAL_MODULE_ASSEMBLY.label_th: สายการประกอบโมดูลกล้อง

baseline.content: UV 경화 접착제·디스펜서 작업 시 광원 차폐 및 화학물질 노출 통제
baseline.content_en: UV cure adhesive dispenser — verify light shielding and chemical exposure control
baseline.content_vi: Khi dùng keo cứng UV và máy nhỏ giọt — kiểm tra che chắn nguồn sáng UV và kiểm soát phơi nhiễm hóa chất
baseline.content_th: งานกาว UV cure และเครื่อง dispenser — ตรวจสอบการกั้นแสง UV และการควบคุมการสัมผัสสารเคมี
baseline.content_id: Saat menggunakan perekat UV cure dan dispenser — verifikasi pelindung sumber cahaya UV dan kontrol paparan bahan kimia
baseline.regulation: 산업안전보건기준규칙 §452 (관리대상 유해물질), KOSHA GUIDE W-15-2017 (자외선 노출)

scenarios.content: UV 광원 직접 노출로 작업자 결막염·각막 화상 발생
scenarios.content_en: Direct UV light exposure causes conjunctivitis / corneal burn to worker
scenarios.content_vi: Phơi nhiễm trực tiếp tia UV gây viêm kết mạc / bỏng giác mạc cho công nhân
scenarios.content_th: การสัมผัสแสง UV โดยตรงทำให้พนักงานเกิดเยื่อบุตาอักเสบ / กระจกตาไหม้
scenarios.content_id: Paparan langsung sinar UV menyebabkan konjungtivitis / luka bakar kornea pekerja

scenarios.content: 에폭시 접착제 미경화 잔류물 피부 접촉 → 알레르기성 접촉피부염
scenarios.content_en: Skin contact with uncured epoxy residue → allergic contact dermatitis
scenarios.content_vi: Da tiếp xúc với keo epoxy chưa cứng → viêm da tiếp xúc dị ứng
scenarios.content_th: ผิวหนังสัมผัสกับสารเอพ็อกซีที่ยังไม่แข็งตัว → ผิวหนังอักเสบจากการสัมผัสแบบแพ้
scenarios.content_id: Kontak kulit dengan residu epoksi belum mengeras → dermatitis kontak alergi

mitigations.content: UV 챔버 인터록·차광 윈도우 정상 작동 확인, 작업자 위치에서 럭스 측정 기록
mitigations.content_en: Verify UV chamber interlock and shielding window; log lux readings at worker position
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra interlock buồng UV và cửa sổ che sáng; ghi nhận giá trị lux tại vị trí công nhân
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบ interlock ของ UV chamber และหน้าต่างกั้นแสง; บันทึกค่า lux ที่ตำแหน่งพนักงาน
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi interlock UV chamber dan jendela pelindung; catat pembacaan lux di posisi pekerja

mitigations.content: MSDS 기반 국소배기 풍속 0.5 m/s 이상 확인 + 니트릴 장갑 착용
mitigations.content_en: Per MSDS — verify local exhaust face velocity ≥ 0.5 m/s and wear nitrile gloves
mitigations.content_vi: Theo MSDS — kiểm tra vận tốc hút cục bộ ≥ 0,5 m/s và mang găng tay nitrile
mitigations.content_th: ตาม MSDS — ตรวจสอบความเร็วลมดูดเฉพาะที่ ≥ 0.5 m/s และสวมถุงมือไนไตรล์
mitigations.content_id: Sesuai MSDS — verifikasi kecepatan hisap lokal ≥ 0,5 m/s dan kenakan sarung tangan nitril

ppe.content: UV 차단 보안경 (UV-A/B 차단율 99% 이상)
ppe.content_en: UV-blocking safety glasses (≥ 99% UV-A/B blocking)
ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ chặn UV (chặn UV-A/B ≥ 99%)
ppe.content_th: แว่นนิรภัยกัน UV (กัน UV-A/B ≥ 99%)
ppe.content_id: Kacamata pengaman penghalang UV (penghalang UV-A/B ≥ 99%)

ppe.content: 니트릴 장갑 + 화학물질 저항 앞치마
ppe.content_en: Nitrile gloves + chemical-resistant apron
ppe.content_vi: Găng tay nitrile + tạp dề chống hóa chất
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือไนไตรล์ + ผ้ากันเปื้อนทนสารเคมี
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan nitril + celemek tahan bahan kimia

baseline.content: AOI(자동광학검사) 장비 레이저 광원 차폐 및 인터록 상태
baseline.content_en: AOI (Automated Optical Inspection) — laser source shielding and interlock status
baseline.content_vi: Thiết bị AOI (kiểm tra quang học tự động) — che chắn nguồn laser và trạng thái interlock
baseline.content_th: เครื่อง AOI (การตรวจสอบทางแสงอัตโนมัติ) — การกั้นแสงเลเซอร์และสถานะ interlock
baseline.content_id: Peralatan AOI (Inspeksi Optik Otomatis) — pelindung sumber laser dan status interlock

scenarios.content: AOI 도어 인터록 해제 상태로 가동 → 클래스 3B 레이저 직접 노출, 망막 손상
scenarios.content_en: AOI runs with door interlock defeated → Class 3B laser direct exposure, retinal damage
scenarios.content_vi: AOI vận hành khi interlock cửa bị vô hiệu → phơi nhiễm trực tiếp laser Class 3B, tổn thương võng mạc
scenarios.content_th: AOI ทำงานโดย interlock ประตูถูกปลด → สัมผัสเลเซอร์ Class 3B โดยตรง ความเสียหายของจอประสาทตา
scenarios.content_id: AOI berjalan dengan interlock pintu dilumpuhkan → paparan langsung laser Class 3B, kerusakan retina

mitigations.content: 교대 시작 시 인터록 작동 테스트 + 임의 우회 흔적(테이프·자석) 확인 후 기록
mitigations.content_en: At shift start — test interlock action and inspect for bypass evidence (tape, magnet), then log
mitigations.content_vi: Đầu ca — thử nghiệm hoạt động interlock và kiểm tra dấu vết bỏ qua (băng dính, nam châm), sau đó ghi nhận
mitigations.content_th: ต้นกะ — ทดสอบการทำงาน interlock และตรวจสอบร่องรอยการข้าม (เทป แม่เหล็ก) จากนั้นบันทึก
mitigations.content_id: Di awal shift — uji aksi interlock dan periksa bukti bypass (selotip, magnet), lalu catat

ppe.content: 레이저 보안경 (해당 파장 OD ≥ 3, AOI 장비 명판 확인)
ppe.content_en: Laser safety goggles (OD ≥ 3 for the wavelength, refer to AOI nameplate)
ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ laser (OD ≥ 3 cho bước sóng tương ứng, tham khảo nhãn AOI)
ppe.content_th: แว่นนิรภัยกันเลเซอร์ (OD ≥ 3 สำหรับความยาวคลื่นที่เกี่ยวข้อง อ้างอิงป้ายเครื่อง AOI)
ppe.content_id: Kacamata pengaman laser (OD ≥ 3 untuk panjang gelombang terkait, lihat papan nama AOI)

baseline.content: 진공 흡착 픽업 노즐 작동 중 손가락 끼임 방지 — 라이트커튼 및 양손 조작 점검
baseline.content_en: Vacuum suction pickup nozzle — light curtain and two-hand control to prevent finger pinch
baseline.content_vi: Vòi hút chân không pickup — rèm sáng và điều khiển hai tay để ngăn kẹp ngón tay
baseline.content_th: หัวดูดสุญญากาศ pickup — light curtain และการควบคุมสองมือเพื่อป้องกันการหนีบนิ้ว
baseline.content_id: Nozel pickup hisap vakum — light curtain dan kontrol dua tangan untuk mencegah jepitan jari

scenarios.content: 픽업 헤드 하강 중 자재 정렬을 위해 손 진입 → 손가락 협착
scenarios.content_en: Hand enters during pickup head descent to align part → finger crush
scenarios.content_vi: Tay đưa vào trong khi đầu pickup hạ xuống để chỉnh chi tiết → kẹp ngón tay
scenarios.content_th: มือเข้าไประหว่างหัว pickup กำลังลงเพื่อจัดวางชิ้นงาน → นิ้วถูกหนีบ
scenarios.content_id: Tangan masuk saat kepala pickup turun untuk meluruskan part → jari terjepit

mitigations.content: 라이트커튼 테스트 막대로 차단 동작 확인 + 정렬 작업은 반드시 정지 후 수행 (LOTO)
mitigations.content_en: Verify light curtain blocking with test rod; alignment work must be done after stop (LOTO)
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra rèm sáng bằng thanh thử; công việc căn chỉnh phải thực hiện sau khi dừng máy (LOTO)
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบ light curtain ด้วยแท่งทดสอบ; งานจัดวางต้องทำหลังหยุดเครื่อง (LOTO)
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi light curtain dengan batang uji; pekerjaan penyelarasan harus dilakukan setelah berhenti (LOTO)

ppe.content: ESD 손목 스트랩 + 끼임 방지 슬림핏 장갑(헐렁한 면장갑 금지)
ppe.content_en: ESD wrist strap + slim-fit anti-pinch gloves (loose cotton gloves prohibited)
ppe.content_vi: Dây đeo cổ tay ESD + găng tay ôm chống kẹp (cấm găng tay vải rộng)
ppe.content_th: สายรัดข้อมือ ESD + ถุงมือฟิตป้องกันการหนีบ (ห้ามใช้ถุงมือผ้าหลวม)
ppe.content_id: Tali pergelangan ESD + sarung tangan pas anti-jepit (sarung tangan kain longgar dilarang)

baseline.content: 클린룸 IPA(이소프로필알코올) 세정 작업 — 환기 및 화기 통제
baseline.content_en: Cleanroom IPA (isopropyl alcohol) cleaning — ventilation and ignition control
baseline.content_vi: Vệ sinh IPA (cồn isopropyl) trong phòng sạch — thông gió và kiểm soát nguồn lửa
baseline.content_th: การทำความสะอาดด้วย IPA (ไอโซโพรพิลแอลกอฮอล์) ในห้องคลีนรูม — การระบายอากาศและควบคุมประกายไฟ
baseline.content_id: Pembersihan IPA (isopropil alkohol) di cleanroom — ventilasi dan kontrol penyalaan

scenarios.content: IPA 증기 축적 + 정전기 방전 스파크 → 클린룸 화재
scenarios.content_en: IPA vapor accumulation + ESD spark → cleanroom fire
scenarios.content_vi: Tích tụ hơi IPA + tia lửa ESD → cháy phòng sạch
scenarios.content_th: การสะสมไอ IPA + ประกายไฟ ESD → ไฟไหม้คลีนรูม
scenarios.content_id: Akumulasi uap IPA + percikan ESD → kebakaran cleanroom

mitigations.content: IPA 보관량 1회 작업분으로 제한, 사용 후 즉시 밀폐 + 환기 차압 확인
mitigations.content_en: Limit IPA on-hand to single work batch, seal immediately after use, verify ventilation pressure differential
mitigations.content_vi: Giới hạn IPA tại chỗ chỉ đủ cho một ca, đóng kín ngay sau khi dùng, kiểm tra chênh áp thông gió
mitigations.content_th: จำกัด IPA หน้างานเท่าที่ใช้ครั้งเดียว ปิดฝาทันทีหลังใช้ ตรวจสอบความต่างความดันการระบายอากาศ
mitigations.content_id: Batasi IPA di tempat hanya untuk satu batch, segera tutup setelah digunakan, verifikasi tekanan diferensial ventilasi

ppe.content: ESD 신발 + 정전기 방지 클린룸복 + 니트릴 장갑
ppe.content_en: ESD shoes + antistatic cleanroom suit + nitrile gloves
ppe.content_vi: Giày ESD + bộ đồ phòng sạch chống tĩnh điện + găng tay nitrile
ppe.content_th: รองเท้า ESD + ชุดคลีนรูมป้องกันไฟฟ้าสถิต + ถุงมือไนไตรล์
ppe.content_id: Sepatu ESD + setelan cleanroom antistatik + sarung tangan nitril

FCBGA_PACKAGE_LINE.label_vi: Dây chuyền chất nền gói FC-BGA
FCBGA_PACKAGE_LINE.label_th: สายงานซับสเตรตแพ็คเกจ FC-BGA

baseline.content: 전기도금조(Cu/Ni/Au) 작업 — 산·강염기 노출 및 미스트 흡입 방지
baseline.content_en: Electroplating bath (Cu/Ni/Au) — prevent acid/strong-base contact and mist inhalation
baseline.content_vi: Bể mạ điện (Cu/Ni/Au) — ngăn tiếp xúc axit/kiềm mạnh và hít phải sương mù
baseline.content_th: บ่อชุบไฟฟ้า (Cu/Ni/Au) — ป้องกันการสัมผัสกรด/ด่างแก่และการสูดดมละออง
baseline.content_id: Bak elektroplating (Cu/Ni/Au) — cegah kontak asam/basa kuat dan inhalasi kabut

scenarios.content: 황산구리 도금조 튐 → 작업자 안면·전박 화학화상
scenarios.content_en: Copper sulfate plating bath splash → chemical burn to worker's face/forearm
scenarios.content_vi: Bể mạ đồng sulfat bắn ra → bỏng hóa chất ở mặt/cẳng tay công nhân
scenarios.content_th: บ่อชุบคอปเปอร์ซัลเฟตกระเด็น → ผิวไหม้สารเคมีที่ใบหน้า/แขนท่อนล่างของพนักงาน
scenarios.content_id: Cipratan bak plating tembaga sulfat → luka bakar kimia di wajah/lengan bawah pekerja

scenarios.content: 도금조 미스트 흡입 → 호흡기 자극, 장기 노출 시 니켈 감작성 피부염
scenarios.content_en: Plating bath mist inhalation → respiratory irritation; long-term exposure causes nickel sensitization dermatitis
scenarios.content_vi: Hít sương mù bể mạ → kích ứng hô hấp; phơi nhiễm dài hạn gây viêm da nhạy cảm niken
scenarios.content_th: สูดดมละอองจากบ่อชุบ → ระคายเคืองทางเดินหายใจ; การสัมผัสระยะยาวทำให้เกิดผิวหนังอักเสบจากการแพ้นิกเกิล
scenarios.content_id: Inhalasi kabut bak plating → iritasi pernapasan; paparan jangka panjang menyebabkan dermatitis sensitisasi nikel

mitigations.content: 푸쉬-풀 후드 풍속 ≥ 0.4 m/s 확인 + 응급세안기·샤워기 30초 이내 도달 동선
mitigations.content_en: Verify push-pull hood face velocity ≥ 0.4 m/s; emergency eyewash/shower within 30-second reach
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra vận tốc hood đẩy-kéo ≥ 0,4 m/s; vòi rửa mắt/vòi sen khẩn cấp trong tầm 30 giây
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบความเร็วลม push-pull hood ≥ 0.4 m/s; ตู้ล้างตา/ฝักบัวฉุกเฉินภายใน 30 วินาที
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi kecepatan hood push-pull ≥ 0,4 m/s; eyewash/shower darurat dalam jangkauan 30 detik

mitigations.content: 도금조 액위·온도 자동 모니터링 알람 동작 확인
mitigations.content_en: Verify plating bath level/temperature auto-monitoring alarm operation
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra báo động tự động giám sát mức/nhiệt độ bể mạ
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบการทำงานของสัญญาณเตือนตรวจสอบระดับ/อุณหภูมิบ่อชุบอัตโนมัติ
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi operasi alarm pemantauan otomatis level/suhu bak plating

ppe.content: 내산·내알칼리 PVC 앞치마 + 페이스쉴드 + 팔꿈치까지 오는 부틸 장갑
ppe.content_en: Acid/alkali-resistant PVC apron + face shield + butyl gloves up to elbow
ppe.content_vi: Tạp dề PVC chống axit/kiềm + tấm chắn mặt + găng tay butyl đến khuỷu tay
ppe.content_th: ผ้ากันเปื้อน PVC ทนกรด-ด่าง + face shield + ถุงมือบิวทิลถึงข้อศอก
ppe.content_id: Celemek PVC tahan asam/basa + pelindung wajah + sarung tangan butil hingga siku

ppe.content: 산성 미스트용 호흡보호구 (APF 10 이상, 카트리지 색상 흰색·노란색 등 ANSI 표준)
ppe.content_en: Respirator for acid mist (APF ≥ 10, ANSI-standard white/yellow cartridge)
ppe.content_vi: Mặt nạ hô hấp cho sương mù axit (APF ≥ 10, cartridge tiêu chuẩn ANSI màu trắng/vàng)
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากกันละอองกรด (APF ≥ 10, cartridge มาตรฐาน ANSI สีขาว/เหลือง)
ppe.content_id: Respirator untuk kabut asam (APF ≥ 10, cartridge standar ANSI putih/kuning)

baseline.content: 노광(Exposure) 장비 UV·DI 광원 차폐 및 포토레지스트 취급 통제
baseline.content_en: Exposure equipment UV/DI light shielding and photoresist handling control
baseline.content_vi: Thiết bị phơi sáng (Exposure) — che chắn nguồn UV/DI và kiểm soát photoresist
baseline.content_th: อุปกรณ์ exposure — กั้นแสง UV/DI และควบคุมการจัดการ photoresist
baseline.content_id: Peralatan exposure — pelindung sumber UV/DI dan kontrol penanganan photoresist

scenarios.content: 포토레지스트 PGMEA 증기 흡입 → 두통·중추신경 자극
scenarios.content_en: Photoresist PGMEA vapor inhalation → headache, CNS irritation
scenarios.content_vi: Hít hơi PGMEA từ photoresist → đau đầu, kích ứng hệ thần kinh trung ương
scenarios.content_th: สูดดมไอ PGMEA จาก photoresist → ปวดศีรษะ ระคายเคืองระบบประสาทส่วนกลาง
scenarios.content_id: Inhalasi uap PGMEA dari photoresist → sakit kepala, iritasi SSP

mitigations.content: 포토레지스트 배합·도포 작업은 흄후드 내에서만, 작업 종료 후 잔량 즉시 회수 용기 분리
mitigations.content_en: Photoresist mixing/coating in fume hood only; after work, immediately segregate residue in recovery container
mitigations.content_vi: Pha trộn/phủ photoresist chỉ trong tủ hút khí; sau công việc, lập tức tách cặn vào thùng thu hồi
mitigations.content_th: การผสม/เคลือบ photoresist ทำเฉพาะใน fume hood; หลังจบงาน แยกของเหลือลงภาชนะรับทันที
mitigations.content_id: Pencampuran/pelapisan photoresist hanya di fume hood; setelah kerja, segera pisahkan residu ke wadah pemulihan

ppe.content: 유기증기용 카트리지 호흡보호구 + 화학물질 저항 장갑(부틸·바이톤)
ppe.content_en: Organic vapor cartridge respirator + chemical-resistant gloves (butyl/Viton)
ppe.content_vi: Mặt nạ cartridge hơi hữu cơ + găng tay chống hóa chất (butyl/Viton)
ppe.content_th: หน้ากาก cartridge ไอสารอินทรีย์ + ถุงมือทนสารเคมี (บิวทิล/Viton)
ppe.content_id: Respirator cartridge uap organik + sarung tangan tahan bahan kimia (butil/Viton)

baseline.content: 리플로우(Reflow) 솔더링 라인 솔더 흄 배기 및 고온 화상 방지
baseline.content_en: Reflow soldering line — solder fume exhaust and high-temperature burn prevention
baseline.content_vi: Dây chuyền hàn reflow — hút khói chì hàn và ngăn bỏng nhiệt độ cao
baseline.content_th: สายงานบัดกรี reflow — การดูดควันบัดกรีและป้องกันไฟลวกอุณหภูมิสูง
baseline.content_id: Lini soldering reflow — pembuangan asap solder dan pencegahan luka bakar suhu tinggi

scenarios.content: 리플로우 챔버 도어 개방 직후 잔열(약 250°C)에 손등·전박 접촉 → 2도 화상
scenarios.content_en: Contact with residual heat (~250°C) right after reflow chamber door open → second-degree burn on hand/forearm
scenarios.content_vi: Tiếp xúc nhiệt dư (~250°C) ngay sau khi mở cửa buồng reflow → bỏng độ 2 ở mu tay/cẳng tay
scenarios.content_th: สัมผัสความร้อนที่เหลือ (~250°C) ทันทีหลังเปิดประตู reflow chamber → ไฟลวกระดับ 2 ที่หลังมือ/แขนล่าง
scenarios.content_id: Kontak dengan panas sisa (~250°C) tepat setelah pintu chamber reflow dibuka → luka bakar derajat 2 di punggung tangan/lengan bawah

scenarios.content: 솔더 흄 국소배기 미작동 시 작업자 호흡기 자극, 장기 노출로 만성 기관지염
scenarios.content_en: Without local solder fume exhaust → worker respiratory irritation, chronic bronchitis from long-term exposure
scenarios.content_vi: Không có hút cục bộ khói hàn → kích ứng hô hấp công nhân, viêm phế quản mãn tính do phơi nhiễm dài hạn
scenarios.content_th: หากไม่มีการดูดควันบัดกรีเฉพาะที่ → ระคายเคืองทางเดินหายใจ หลอดลมอักเสบเรื้อรังจากการสัมผัสระยะยาว
scenarios.content_id: Tanpa pembuangan asap solder lokal → iritasi pernapasan pekerja, bronkitis kronis dari paparan jangka panjang

mitigations.content: 리플로우 도어 개방 후 60초 쿨링 대기 + 챔버 표면 온도 70°C 이하 확인
mitigations.content_en: After reflow door open, wait 60 s cooling and confirm chamber surface ≤ 70°C
mitigations.content_vi: Sau khi mở cửa reflow, đợi làm mát 60 giây và xác nhận bề mặt buồng ≤ 70°C
mitigations.content_th: หลังเปิดประตู reflow รอคูลลิ่ง 60 วินาที และยืนยันพื้นผิวห้อง ≤ 70°C
mitigations.content_id: Setelah pintu reflow dibuka, tunggu pendinginan 60 detik dan konfirmasi permukaan chamber ≤ 70°C

mitigations.content: 솔더 흄 국소배기 차압 게이지 정상 범위 확인, 필터 교체 주기 표시 부착
mitigations.content_en: Verify solder fume LEV pressure gauge in normal range; post filter-change schedule label
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra đồng hồ chênh áp LEV khói hàn ở dải bình thường; dán nhãn lịch thay bộ lọc
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบเกจวัดความดัน LEV ควันบัดกรีในช่วงปกติ; ติดป้ายกำหนดเปลี่ยนตัวกรอง
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi gauge tekanan LEV asap solder pada rentang normal; pasang label jadwal ganti filter

ppe.content: 내열 장갑 (250°C 30초 견딤) + 보안경
ppe.content_en: Heat-resistant gloves (withstand 250°C for 30 s) + safety glasses
ppe.content_vi: Găng tay chịu nhiệt (chịu 250°C trong 30 giây) + kính bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือทนความร้อน (ทน 250°C นาน 30 วินาที) + แว่นนิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan tahan panas (tahan 250°C selama 30 detik) + kacamata pengaman

baseline.content: AGV(자동 운반 차량) 동선 — 보행 통로 분리 및 비상정지 버튼 가용성
baseline.content_en: AGV (Automated Guided Vehicle) routing — pedestrian path separation and E-Stop accessibility
baseline.content_vi: Tuyến AGV (xe vận chuyển tự động) — tách lối đi bộ và khả năng tiếp cận nút dừng khẩn cấp
baseline.content_th: เส้นทาง AGV (รถลำเลียงอัตโนมัติ) — แยกทางคนเดินและการเข้าถึงปุ่ม E-Stop
baseline.content_id: Rute AGV (Automated Guided Vehicle) — pemisahan jalur pejalan kaki dan aksesibilitas tombol E-Stop

scenarios.content: AGV 정지 센서 오작동 + 작업자 통로 횡단 → 다리 충돌, 골절
scenarios.content_en: AGV stop sensor malfunction + worker crosses path → leg impact, fracture
scenarios.content_vi: Cảm biến dừng AGV trục trặc + công nhân băng qua đường → va chân, gãy xương
scenarios.content_th: เซนเซอร์หยุด AGV ทำงานผิดปกติ + พนักงานข้ามทาง → ขากระแทก กระดูกหัก
scenarios.content_id: Sensor henti AGV malfungsi + pekerja menyeberang jalur → tabrakan kaki, patah tulang

mitigations.content: AGV 노선 황색 라인 + 횡단 지점 안전 게이트, E-Stop 5 m 간격 배치 확인
mitigations.content_en: AGV path yellow line + safety gate at crossings; verify E-Stop at 5 m intervals
mitigations.content_vi: Vạch vàng tuyến AGV + cổng an toàn tại điểm băng ngang; kiểm tra E-Stop bố trí mỗi 5 m
mitigations.content_th: เส้นเหลืองเส้นทาง AGV + ประตูนิรภัยที่จุดข้าม; ตรวจสอบ E-Stop ทุก 5 m
mitigations.content_id: Garis kuning rute AGV + gerbang pengaman di titik penyeberangan; verifikasi E-Stop setiap 5 m

ppe.content: 고가시성 조끼 (클린룸 호환 형광 스트립) + 안전화
ppe.content_en: Hi-vis vest (cleanroom-compatible reflective strips) + safety shoes
ppe.content_vi: Áo gile phản quang (sọc tương thích phòng sạch) + giày bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: เสื้อกั๊กสะท้อนแสง (แถบเข้ากันได้กับคลีนรูม) + รองเท้านิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Rompi hi-vis (strip reflektif kompatibel cleanroom) + sepatu pengaman

MOBILITY_SENSOR_SMT.label_vi: Dây chuyền SMT cảm biến tự lái
MOBILITY_SENSOR_SMT.label_th: สายงาน SMT เซนเซอร์รถยนต์ไร้คนขับ

baseline.content: 솔더 페이스트 스크린프린터 — 스퀴지 협착 및 페이스트 화학물질 폭로 통제
baseline.content_en: Solder paste screen printer — squeegee pinch and paste chemical exposure control
baseline.content_vi: Máy in lưới kem hàn — kiểm soát kẹp gạt và phơi nhiễm hóa chất kem hàn
baseline.content_th: เครื่องพิมพ์ลายตะแกรงครีมบัดกรี — ควบคุมการหนีบของ squeegee และการสัมผัสสารเคมี
baseline.content_id: Printer screen pasta solder — kontrol jepitan squeegee dan paparan kimia pasta

scenarios.content: 스크린프린터 클리닝 중 인터록 우회 → 스퀴지 하강 시 손등 협착
scenarios.content_en: During screen printer cleaning, interlock bypass → squeegee descent crushes back of hand
scenarios.content_vi: Khi vệ sinh máy in lưới, bỏ qua interlock → squeegee hạ xuống kẹp mu bàn tay
scenarios.content_th: ระหว่างทำความสะอาดเครื่องพิมพ์ลายตะแกรง การข้าม interlock → squeegee ลงทับหลังมือ
scenarios.content_id: Saat membersihkan printer screen, bypass interlock → squeegee turun menghancurkan punggung tangan

scenarios.content: 무연 솔더 페이스트 플럭스 피부 접촉 반복 → 손등 습진성 피부염
scenarios.content_en: Repeated skin contact with lead-free solder paste flux → eczematous dermatitis on back of hand
scenarios.content_vi: Tiếp xúc da lặp đi lặp lại với flux kem hàn không chì → viêm da chàm ở mu bàn tay
scenarios.content_th: การสัมผัสผิวซ้ำๆ กับฟลักซ์ครีมบัดกรีไร้สารตะกั่ว → ผิวหนังอักเสบเรื้อรังที่หลังมือ
scenarios.content_id: Kontak kulit berulang dengan fluks pasta solder bebas timbal → dermatitis eksematous di punggung tangan

mitigations.content: 스크린프린터 인터록 LOTO + 클리닝 작업은 전원 차단 상태에서만 수행
mitigations.content_en: LOTO screen printer interlock; cleaning only after power isolation
mitigations.content_vi: LOTO interlock máy in lưới; vệ sinh chỉ sau khi cách ly nguồn
mitigations.content_th: LOTO interlock เครื่องพิมพ์ลาย; ทำความสะอาดเฉพาะหลังตัดแหล่งจ่ายไฟ
mitigations.content_id: LOTO interlock printer screen; pembersihan hanya setelah isolasi daya

mitigations.content: 솔더 페이스트 잔량 회수는 일회용 와이프 사용, 사용 후 지정 폐기물 통(노란색 라벨)으로 분리
mitigations.content_en: Use single-use wipes for paste residue recovery; segregate into designated hazardous waste bin (yellow label)
mitigations.content_vi: Dùng khăn lau một lần để thu hồi cặn kem hàn; phân loại vào thùng rác nguy hại quy định (nhãn vàng)
mitigations.content_th: ใช้ผ้าเช็ดแบบใช้ครั้งเดียวสำหรับเก็บเศษครีมบัดกรี; แยกลงถังขยะอันตรายที่กำหนด (ฉลากเหลือง)
mitigations.content_id: Gunakan lap sekali pakai untuk pemulihan residu pasta; pisahkan ke tong limbah berbahaya yang ditunjuk (label kuning)

ppe.content: ESD 니트릴 장갑 (이중 착용 권장) + 보안경
ppe.content_en: ESD nitrile gloves (double-layer recommended) + safety glasses
ppe.content_vi: Găng tay nitrile ESD (khuyến nghị đeo 2 lớp) + kính bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือไนไตรล์ ESD (แนะนำสวมสองชั้น) + แว่นนิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan nitril ESD (disarankan dua lapis) + kacamata pengaman

baseline.content: Pick & Place 마운터 — 고속 헤드 접근 영역 차단 및 ESD 충격 방지
baseline.content_en: Pick & Place mounter — block high-speed head approach zone and prevent ESD shock
baseline.content_vi: Máy mounter Pick & Place — chặn khu vực tiếp cận đầu tốc độ cao và ngăn sốc ESD
baseline.content_th: เครื่อง mounter Pick & Place — กั้นโซนเข้าใกล้หัวความเร็วสูงและป้องกันสตาติกช็อก
baseline.content_id: Mounter Pick & Place — blok zona pendekatan kepala kecepatan tinggi dan cegah kejutan ESD

scenarios.content: 마운터 가동 중 피더 보충하려 도어 열림 → 헤드 충돌, 두부 외상
scenarios.content_en: Door opened to refill feeders while mounter runs → head impact, head trauma
scenarios.content_vi: Mở cửa để nạp lại feeder khi mounter đang chạy → va đập đầu, chấn thương đầu
scenarios.content_th: เปิดประตูเพื่อเติม feeder ขณะ mounter ทำงาน → หัวกระแทก บาดเจ็บที่ศีรษะ
scenarios.content_id: Pintu dibuka untuk mengisi ulang feeder saat mounter berjalan → tabrakan kepala, trauma kepala

scenarios.content: ESD 미접지 상태에서 자율주행 센서 IC 취급 → 약 5 kV 정전기 방전 시 작업자 손가락 통전 충격
scenarios.content_en: Handling AD sensor IC without ESD grounding → ~5 kV ESD discharge causes finger shock to worker
scenarios.content_vi: Xử lý IC cảm biến AD khi không nối đất ESD → phóng tĩnh điện ~5 kV gây sốc ngón tay cho công nhân
scenarios.content_th: จับ IC เซนเซอร์ AD โดยไม่ต่อสายดิน ESD → ปล่อยสตาติก ~5 kV ทำให้พนักงานช็อกที่นิ้ว
scenarios.content_id: Menangani IC sensor AD tanpa grounding ESD → debit ESD ~5 kV menyebabkan kejutan jari pekerja

mitigations.content: 피더 보충은 일시정지 시퀀스(Pause)로 수행, 도어 인터록 우회 금지 (위반 시 LOTO 위반 보고)
mitigations.content_en: Refill feeders via Pause sequence; never bypass door interlock (report as LOTO violation)
mitigations.content_vi: Nạp lại feeder qua trình tự Pause; không bao giờ bỏ qua interlock cửa (báo cáo vi phạm LOTO)
mitigations.content_th: เติม feeder ผ่านลำดับ Pause; ห้ามข้าม interlock ประตูเด็ดขาด (รายงานเป็นการละเมิด LOTO)
mitigations.content_id: Isi ulang feeder via urutan Pause; jangan pernah bypass interlock pintu (laporkan sebagai pelanggaran LOTO)

mitigations.content: 교대 시작 시 손목 스트랩 저항 1~10 MΩ 측정 + ESD 매트 접지 확인
mitigations.content_en: At shift start — measure wrist strap resistance 1–10 MΩ and verify ESD mat grounding
mitigations.content_vi: Đầu ca — đo điện trở dây cổ tay 1–10 MΩ và kiểm tra nối đất thảm ESD
mitigations.content_th: ต้นกะ — วัดความต้านทานสายรัดข้อมือ 1–10 MΩ และตรวจสอบการต่อสายดินของแผ่น ESD
mitigations.content_id: Di awal shift — ukur resistansi tali pergelangan 1–10 MΩ dan verifikasi grounding mat ESD

ppe.content: ESD 손목 스트랩 + ESD 신발 + ESD 정전기 방지복
ppe.content_en: ESD wrist strap + ESD shoes + ESD antistatic garment
ppe.content_vi: Dây đeo cổ tay ESD + giày ESD + đồ chống tĩnh điện ESD
ppe.content_th: สายรัดข้อมือ ESD + รองเท้า ESD + ชุดป้องกันไฟฟ้าสถิต ESD
ppe.content_id: Tali pergelangan ESD + sepatu ESD + pakaian antistatik ESD

baseline.content: LiDAR 모듈 캘리브레이션 — 클래스 3R 적외선 레이저 광원 노출 통제
baseline.content_en: LiDAR module calibration — Class 3R infrared laser exposure control
baseline.content_vi: Hiệu chuẩn mô-đun LiDAR — kiểm soát phơi nhiễm laser hồng ngoại Class 3R
baseline.content_th: การปรับเทียบโมดูล LiDAR — ควบคุมการสัมผัสเลเซอร์อินฟราเรด Class 3R
baseline.content_id: Kalibrasi modul LiDAR — kontrol paparan laser inframerah Class 3R

scenarios.content: 캘리브레이션 중 보안경 미착용 → 905 nm 적외선 직접 노출, 눈은 가시 자극 없이 망막 손상
scenarios.content_en: No goggles during calibration → 905 nm IR direct exposure causes retinal damage without visible cue
scenarios.content_vi: Không đeo kính khi hiệu chuẩn → phơi nhiễm trực tiếp IR 905 nm gây tổn thương võng mạc mà mắt không cảm nhận được
scenarios.content_th: ไม่สวมแว่นขณะปรับเทียบ → สัมผัสตรง IR 905 nm ทำลายจอประสาทตาโดยไม่มีสัญญาณที่มองเห็นได้
scenarios.content_id: Tidak pakai kacamata saat kalibrasi → paparan langsung IR 905 nm merusak retina tanpa isyarat visual

mitigations.content: 캘리브레이션 부스 출입 통제 + 외부 빨간 경고등 점등, 출입 명부 기록
mitigations.content_en: Restrict calibration booth access; red warning lamp lit outside; log entries
mitigations.content_vi: Hạn chế ra vào buồng hiệu chuẩn; đèn cảnh báo đỏ bên ngoài; ghi nhật ký ra vào
mitigations.content_th: จำกัดการเข้าออกบูธปรับเทียบ; ไฟเตือนสีแดงด้านนอก; บันทึกการเข้าออก
mitigations.content_id: Batasi akses booth kalibrasi; lampu peringatan merah menyala di luar; catat akses masuk

ppe.content: 905 nm 대응 레이저 보안경 (OD ≥ 4 @ 905 nm)
ppe.content_en: Laser safety goggles for 905 nm (OD ≥ 4 @ 905 nm)
ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ laser cho 905 nm (OD ≥ 4 @ 905 nm)
ppe.content_th: แว่นนิรภัยเลเซอร์สำหรับ 905 nm (OD ≥ 4 @ 905 nm)
ppe.content_id: Kacamata pengaman laser untuk 905 nm (OD ≥ 4 @ 905 nm)

OLED_MASK_FABRICATION.label_vi: Chế tạo mặt nạ kim loại OLED (FMM)
OLED_MASK_FABRICATION.label_th: การผลิตหน้ากากโลหะ OLED (FMM)

baseline.content: Invar 합금 에칭 — 염화제2철(FeCl3) 에천트 노출 및 미스트 통제
baseline.content_en: Invar alloy etching — ferric chloride (FeCl3) etchant exposure and mist control
baseline.content_vi: Khắc hợp kim Invar — kiểm soát phơi nhiễm và sương mù chất khắc FeCl3 (ferric chloride)
baseline.content_th: การกัดโลหะอินวาร์ — ควบคุมการสัมผัสและละอองสารกัด FeCl3 (เฟอร์ริกคลอไรด์)
baseline.content_id: Etsa paduan Invar — kontrol paparan dan kabut etchant FeCl3 (ferri klorida)

scenarios.content: FeCl3 에천트 라인 누설 → 콘크리트 바닥 부식, 작업자 발 화상
scenarios.content_en: FeCl3 etchant line leak → concrete floor corrosion, foot burn to worker
scenarios.content_vi: Rò rỉ đường ống etchant FeCl3 → ăn mòn nền bê tông, bỏng chân công nhân
scenarios.content_th: การรั่วของท่อสารกัด FeCl3 → กัดกร่อนพื้นคอนกรีต ไหม้เท้าพนักงาน
scenarios.content_id: Kebocoran pipa etchant FeCl3 → korosi lantai beton, luka bakar kaki pekerja

scenarios.content: 스프레이 에칭 챔버 미스트 흡입 → 호흡기 자극 및 점막 손상
scenarios.content_en: Spray etching chamber mist inhalation → respiratory irritation and mucosal damage
scenarios.content_vi: Hít sương mù buồng khắc phun → kích ứng hô hấp và tổn thương niêm mạc
scenarios.content_th: สูดดมละอองห้องกัดแบบสเปรย์ → ระคายเคืองทางเดินหายใจและเสียหายของเยื่อบุ
scenarios.content_id: Inhalasi kabut ruang etsa spray → iritasi pernapasan dan kerusakan mukosa

mitigations.content: 에천트 라인 매일 누설 점검 + 바닥 누액 감지 센서 동작 확인 (감지 시 자동 라인 차단)
mitigations.content_en: Daily etchant line leak check; floor leak detector operational (auto line shutdown on detection)
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra rò rỉ đường ống etchant hằng ngày; cảm biến rò rỉ nền hoạt động (tự ngắt đường ống khi phát hiện)
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบการรั่วของท่อสารกัดทุกวัน; เซนเซอร์ตรวจการรั่วที่พื้นทำงาน (ตัดท่ออัตโนมัติเมื่อพบ)
mitigations.content_id: Pemeriksaan kebocoran pipa etchant harian; detektor kebocoran lantai berfungsi (penutupan pipa otomatis saat terdeteksi)

mitigations.content: 에칭 챔버 도어 잠금 + 작업 종료 후 5분 환기 사이클 완료 전 도어 개방 금지
mitigations.content_en: Etch chamber door locked; do not open until 5-min ventilation cycle completes after work
mitigations.content_vi: Khóa cửa buồng khắc; không mở cho đến khi chu trình thông gió 5 phút hoàn tất sau công việc
mitigations.content_th: ล็อกประตูห้องกัด; ห้ามเปิดจนกว่ารอบระบายอากาศ 5 นาทีจะเสร็จหลังจบงาน
mitigations.content_id: Pintu chamber etsa terkunci; jangan dibuka sampai siklus ventilasi 5 menit selesai setelah kerja

ppe.content: 산성용 카트리지 호흡보호구 + 풀 페이스 마스크 + 부틸 장갑 + PVC 부츠
ppe.content_en: Acid-rated respirator cartridge + full-face mask + butyl gloves + PVC boots
ppe.content_vi: Cartridge mặt nạ hô hấp chống axit + mặt nạ kín mặt + găng tay butyl + ủng PVC
ppe.content_th: cartridge หน้ากากกันกรด + หน้ากากเต็มหน้า + ถุงมือบิวทิล + รองเท้าบูท PVC
ppe.content_id: Cartridge respirator tahan asam + masker full-face + sarung tangan butil + sepatu bot PVC

baseline.content: 마스크 레이저 가공 — 클래스 4 펨토초 레이저 광원 차폐 및 흄 배기
baseline.content_en: Mask laser machining — Class 4 femtosecond laser shielding and fume exhaust
baseline.content_vi: Gia công laser mặt nạ — che chắn laser femto giây Class 4 và hút khói
baseline.content_th: การกลึงด้วยเลเซอร์มาส์ก — กั้นเลเซอร์เฟมโตวินาที Class 4 และการดูดควัน
baseline.content_id: Pemesinan laser masker — pelindung laser femtosecond Class 4 dan pembuangan asap

scenarios.content: 레이저 가공기 인터록 해제 가동 → 클래스 4 레이저 산란광 노출, 즉시 망막 손상 + 피부 화상
scenarios.content_en: Laser machine runs with interlock defeated → Class 4 laser scattered light, instant retinal damage + skin burn
scenarios.content_vi: Máy laser hoạt động khi interlock bị vô hiệu → ánh sáng laser Class 4 tán xạ, tổn thương võng mạc tức thì + bỏng da
scenarios.content_th: เครื่องเลเซอร์ทำงานโดย interlock ถูกปลด → แสงเลเซอร์ Class 4 กระจาย ทำลายจอประสาทตาทันที + ไหม้ผิวหนัง
scenarios.content_id: Mesin laser berjalan dengan interlock dilumpuhkan → cahaya hambur laser Class 4, kerusakan retina instan + luka bakar kulit

scenarios.content: Invar 가공 시 발생하는 금속 흄(Fe·Ni) 흡입 → 금속열병(metal fume fever)
scenarios.content_en: Inhalation of metal fume (Fe/Ni) from Invar machining → metal fume fever
scenarios.content_vi: Hít khói kim loại (Fe/Ni) từ gia công Invar → sốt khói kim loại (metal fume fever)
scenarios.content_th: การสูดดมควันโลหะ (Fe/Ni) จากการกลึงอินวาร์ → ไข้ควันโลหะ (metal fume fever)
scenarios.content_id: Inhalasi asap logam (Fe/Ni) dari pemesinan Invar → demam asap logam (metal fume fever)

mitigations.content: 레이저 가공실 출입 전 작동 표시등(빨간 경광) 확인 + 인터록 우회 금지 — 위반 시 즉시 정지
mitigations.content_en: Before entering laser room, confirm running indicator (red beacon); never bypass interlock — immediate stop on violation
mitigations.content_vi: Trước khi vào phòng laser, kiểm tra đèn báo vận hành (đèn đỏ); không bao giờ bỏ qua interlock — dừng ngay khi vi phạm
mitigations.content_th: ก่อนเข้าห้องเลเซอร์ ตรวจสอบไฟแสดงการทำงาน (ไฟแดง); ห้ามข้าม interlock — หยุดทันทีเมื่อละเมิด
mitigations.content_id: Sebelum masuk ruang laser, konfirmasi lampu indikator (lampu merah); jangan pernah bypass interlock — hentikan segera jika dilanggar

mitigations.content: 흄 배기 풍속 ≥ 0.5 m/s 측정 + HEPA 필터 교체 표시 확인
mitigations.content_en: Measure fume exhaust face velocity ≥ 0.5 m/s; verify HEPA filter change indicator
mitigations.content_vi: Đo vận tốc hút khói ≥ 0,5 m/s; kiểm tra chỉ báo thay lọc HEPA
mitigations.content_th: วัดความเร็วลมดูดควัน ≥ 0.5 m/s; ตรวจสอบตัวบ่งชี้การเปลี่ยน HEPA filter
mitigations.content_id: Ukur kecepatan pembuangan asap ≥ 0,5 m/s; verifikasi indikator penggantian filter HEPA

ppe.content: Class 4 펨토초 대응 레이저 보안경 (해당 파장 OD ≥ 6)
ppe.content_en: Class 4 femtosecond laser safety goggles (OD ≥ 6 at wavelength)
ppe.content_vi: Kính bảo hộ laser Class 4 femto giây (OD ≥ 6 tại bước sóng)
ppe.content_th: แว่นนิรภัยเลเซอร์ Class 4 เฟมโตวินาที (OD ≥ 6 ที่ความยาวคลื่น)
ppe.content_id: Kacamata pengaman laser Class 4 femtosecond (OD ≥ 6 pada panjang gelombang)

ppe.content: 금속 흄용 P3 필터 마스크 (KF94 이상 또는 N95+P100)
ppe.content_en: P3 filter mask for metal fume (KF94 or higher, or N95+P100)
ppe.content_vi: Khẩu trang lọc P3 cho khói kim loại (KF94 trở lên, hoặc N95+P100)
ppe.content_th: หน้ากากกรอง P3 สำหรับควันโลหะ (KF94 ขึ้นไป หรือ N95+P100)
ppe.content_id: Masker filter P3 untuk asap logam (KF94 atau lebih tinggi, atau N95+P100)

baseline.content: 마스크 텐셔닝(인장) 공정 — 프레임 장력 해제 시 튐(snap-back) 차단
baseline.content_en: Mask tensioning process — block snap-back when frame tension released
baseline.content_vi: Công đoạn căng mặt nạ — chặn bật ngược khi giải phóng lực căng khung
baseline.content_th: ขั้นตอนขึงมาส์ก — กั้นการดีดกลับเมื่อปล่อยแรงตึงของเฟรม
baseline.content_id: Proses tensioning masker — blokir snap-back saat tegangan frame dilepas

scenarios.content: 텐셔닝 프레임 클램프 파손 → 마스크 시트 튐, 작업자 안면 자상
scenarios.content_en: Tensioning frame clamp failure → mask sheet snap-back causes facial laceration
scenarios.content_vi: Hỏng kẹp khung căng → tấm mặt nạ bật ngược gây vết rách ở mặt
scenarios.content_th: แคลมป์เฟรมขึงพัง → แผ่นมาส์กดีดกลับทำให้ใบหน้าบาดเป็นแผล
scenarios.content_id: Kegagalan klem frame tensioning → snap-back lembar masker menyebabkan luka robek di wajah

mitigations.content: 텐셔닝 작업 시 폴리카보네이트 가드 폐쇄 확인 + 클램프 토크값 사양(±5%) 기록
mitigations.content_en: During tensioning, confirm polycarbonate guard closed; log clamp torque to spec (±5%)
mitigations.content_vi: Khi căng, xác nhận tấm gác polycarbonate đóng; ghi lực siết kẹp theo quy cách (±5%)
mitigations.content_th: ระหว่างการขึง ยืนยันว่าการ์ดโพลีคาร์บอเนตปิด; บันทึกแรงบิดแคลมป์ตามสเปก (±5%)
mitigations.content_id: Saat tensioning, konfirmasi pelindung polikarbonat tertutup; catat torsi klem sesuai spek (±5%)

ppe.content: 페이스쉴드 (충격용, ANSI Z87.1+) + 절단 방지 장갑 (EN 388 Cut Level 5)
ppe.content_en: Face shield (impact-rated, ANSI Z87.1+) + cut-resistant gloves (EN 388 Cut Level 5)
ppe.content_vi: Tấm chắn mặt (chịu va đập, ANSI Z87.1+) + găng tay chống cắt (EN 388 Cut Level 5)
ppe.content_th: face shield (ทนแรงกระแทก ANSI Z87.1+) + ถุงมือกันบาด (EN 388 Cut Level 5)
ppe.content_id: Pelindung wajah (tahan benturan, ANSI Z87.1+) + sarung tangan tahan potong (EN 388 Cut Level 5)

EV_POWER_MODULE_ASSEMBLY.label_th: การประกอบโมดูลพลังงาน EV (Inverter/OBC)

baseline.content: 고전압(HV) 시험 — 600~1200 VDC 활선 작업 시 절연 보호 및 격리
baseline.content_en: High-voltage (HV) testing — 600–1200 VDC live work insulation protection and isolation
baseline.content_vi: Kiểm tra điện áp cao (HV) — bảo vệ cách điện và cách ly khi làm việc trực tiếp 600–1200 VDC
baseline.content_th: การทดสอบไฟฟ้าแรงสูง (HV) — การป้องกันฉนวนและการแยกตัวเมื่อทำงานสด 600–1200 VDC
baseline.content_id: Pengujian tegangan tinggi (HV) — perlindungan isolasi dan isolasi saat kerja hidup 600–1200 VDC

scenarios.content: HV 시험 종료 후 DC 링크 캐패시터 잔류전압(>60 V) 미방전 상태에서 커넥터 분리 → 감전
scenarios.content_en: Disconnecting connector before DC link capacitor residual (>60 V) discharges after HV test → electric shock
scenarios.content_vi: Tháo connector trước khi tụ DC link xả (>60 V) sau kiểm tra HV → điện giật
scenarios.content_th: ถอด connector ก่อนที่ตัวเก็บประจุ DC link จะคายประจุ (>60 V) หลังการทดสอบ HV → ไฟดูด
scenarios.content_id: Mencabut konektor sebelum kapasitor DC link discharge (>60 V) setelah uji HV → kejutan listrik

scenarios.content: 절연 매트·장갑 미사용 상태에서 활선 검측 → 아크 플래시 화상
scenarios.content_en: Live measurement without insulating mat/gloves → arc flash burn
scenarios.content_vi: Đo điện sống mà không dùng thảm/găng tay cách điện → bỏng do arc flash
scenarios.content_th: การวัดสายไฟสดโดยไม่ใช้แผ่นรอง/ถุงมือฉนวน → ไหม้จาก arc flash
scenarios.content_id: Pengukuran hidup tanpa mat/sarung tangan isolasi → luka bakar arc flash

mitigations.content: HV 시험 종료 후 자동 방전 회로 동작 확인 + 잔류전압 멀티미터로 < 60 VDC 확인 후 작업 (KOSHA GUIDE E-49)
mitigations.content_en: After HV test verify auto-discharge operation; confirm residual < 60 VDC with multimeter before work (KOSHA GUIDE E-49)
mitigations.content_vi: Sau khi kiểm tra HV, xác nhận hoạt động xả tự động; xác nhận điện áp dư < 60 VDC bằng đồng hồ đa năng trước khi làm (KOSHA GUIDE E-49)
mitigations.content_th: หลังการทดสอบ HV ตรวจสอบการทำงานของวงจรคายประจุอัตโนมัติ; ยืนยันแรงดันตกค้าง < 60 VDC ด้วยมัลติมิเตอร์ก่อนทำงาน (KOSHA GUIDE E-49)
mitigations.content_id: Setelah uji HV verifikasi auto-discharge; konfirmasi sisa < 60 VDC dengan multimeter sebelum kerja (KOSHA GUIDE E-49)

mitigations.content: HV 작업 구역 안전거리(약 1 m) 표시선 + 비인가자 출입 통제, 2인 1조 원칙
mitigations.content_en: HV work zone safe-distance line (~1 m); restrict unauthorized entry; two-person team principle
mitigations.content_vi: Vạch khoảng cách an toàn khu HV (~1 m); hạn chế người không phận sự; nguyên tắc 2 người 1 tổ
mitigations.content_th: เส้นระยะปลอดภัยพื้นที่ HV (~1 m); จำกัดผู้ไม่มีอำนาจหน้าที่; หลักการ 2 คน 1 ทีม
mitigations.content_id: Garis jarak aman zona HV (~1 m); batasi akses tak berwenang; prinsip tim 2 orang

ppe.content: 절연 장갑 Class 0 (1000 V AC, 1500 V DC) + 절연 매트 + 아크 플래시 보호복 (4 cal/cm² 이상)
ppe.content_en: Insulating gloves Class 0 (1000 V AC, 1500 V DC) + insulating mat + arc flash suit (≥ 4 cal/cm²)
ppe.content_vi: Găng tay cách điện Class 0 (1000 V AC, 1500 V DC) + thảm cách điện + đồ chống arc flash (≥ 4 cal/cm²)
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือฉนวน Class 0 (1000 V AC, 1500 V DC) + แผ่นรองฉนวน + ชุดกันอาร์กแฟลช (≥ 4 cal/cm²)
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan isolasi Class 0 (1000 V AC, 1500 V DC) + mat isolasi + setelan arc flash (≥ 4 cal/cm²)

baseline.content: 파워모듈 본딩(SiC 칩 부착) — 무연 솔더 + 플럭스 흄 배기 및 고온 화상 방지
baseline.content_en: Power module bonding (SiC chip attach) — lead-free solder + flux fume exhaust and high-temp burn prevention
baseline.content_vi: Gắn chip SiC mô-đun điện — kem hàn không chì + hút khói flux và ngăn bỏng nhiệt
baseline.content_th: การยึดชิป SiC ของโมดูลพลังงาน — บัดกรีไร้สารตะกั่ว + ดูดควันฟลักซ์และป้องกันไหม้อุณหภูมิสูง
baseline.content_id: Bonding modul daya (SiC chip attach) — solder bebas timbal + pembuangan asap fluks dan pencegahan luka bakar suhu tinggi

scenarios.content: 본딩 챔버 도어 열림 시 약 280°C 핫플레이트 접촉 → 손바닥 3도 화상
scenarios.content_en: Contact with ~280°C hotplate when bonding chamber door opens → third-degree burn on palm
scenarios.content_vi: Tiếp xúc bàn nóng ~280°C khi mở cửa buồng bonding → bỏng độ 3 ở lòng bàn tay
scenarios.content_th: สัมผัสฮอตเพลต ~280°C เมื่อเปิดประตูห้อง bonding → ไฟลวกระดับ 3 ที่ฝ่ามือ
scenarios.content_id: Kontak dengan hotplate ~280°C saat pintu chamber bonding terbuka → luka bakar derajat 3 di telapak tangan

mitigations.content: 본딩 챔버 도어 인터록 — 표면 온도 70°C 이하 도달 전 도어 잠금 유지
mitigations.content_en: Bonding chamber door interlock — keep door locked until surface ≤ 70°C
mitigations.content_vi: Interlock cửa buồng bonding — giữ khóa cửa cho đến khi bề mặt ≤ 70°C
mitigations.content_th: interlock ประตูห้อง bonding — ล็อกประตูจนกว่าพื้นผิวจะ ≤ 70°C
mitigations.content_id: Interlock pintu chamber bonding — kunci pintu sampai permukaan ≤ 70°C

ppe.content: 내열 가죽 장갑(300°C 60초 견딤) + 보안경
ppe.content_en: Heat-resistant leather gloves (300°C 60 s) + safety glasses
ppe.content_vi: Găng tay da chịu nhiệt (300°C trong 60 giây) + kính bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: ถุงมือหนังทนความร้อน (300°C 60 วินาที) + แว่นนิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Sarung tangan kulit tahan panas (300°C 60 detik) + kacamata pengaman

baseline.content: EOL(End-of-Line) 시험대 — 회전기계(다이나모) 가동 영역 격리
baseline.content_en: EOL (End-of-Line) test rig — isolate rotating dynamometer area
baseline.content_vi: Trạm kiểm tra EOL (End-of-Line) — cách ly khu vực dyno quay
baseline.content_th: ชุดทดสอบ EOL (End-of-Line) — แยกพื้นที่ dynamometer หมุน
baseline.content_id: Rig uji EOL (End-of-Line) — isolasi area dinamometer berputar

scenarios.content: 다이나모 가동 중 케이블 연결 확인하려 가드 안 진입 → 회전축에 작업복 말림, 회전체 접촉
scenarios.content_en: Entering guard area to check cable while dyno runs → garment caught in rotating shaft, contact with rotor
scenarios.content_vi: Vào trong tấm gác để kiểm tra cáp khi dyno đang chạy → trang phục bị cuốn vào trục quay, tiếp xúc rotor
scenarios.content_th: เข้าในพื้นที่การ์ดเพื่อตรวจสายเคเบิลขณะ dyno ทำงาน → ชุดทำงานถูกดึงเข้าแกนหมุน สัมผัสกับโรเตอร์
scenarios.content_id: Memasuki area pelindung untuk memeriksa kabel saat dyno berjalan → pakaian terjerat poros putar, kontak dengan rotor

mitigations.content: EOL 가드 도어 인터록 작동 확인 + 가드 안 진입 전 LOTO 절차(라벨링 포함)
mitigations.content_en: Verify EOL guard door interlock; before entering guard area execute LOTO (incl. labeling)
mitigations.content_vi: Kiểm tra interlock cửa gác EOL; trước khi vào khu gác, thực hiện LOTO (kèm dán nhãn)
mitigations.content_th: ตรวจสอบ interlock ประตูการ์ด EOL; ก่อนเข้าพื้นที่การ์ด ทำ LOTO (รวมการติดป้าย)
mitigations.content_id: Verifikasi interlock pintu pelindung EOL; sebelum memasuki area pelindung lakukan LOTO (termasuk pelabelan)

ppe.content: 타이트한 작업복(소매 단추 잠금) + 안전화 + 보안경
ppe.content_en: Snug-fit workwear (sleeves buttoned) + safety shoes + safety glasses
ppe.content_vi: Quần áo ôm sát (cài cúc tay áo) + giày bảo hộ + kính bảo hộ
ppe.content_th: ชุดทำงานพอดีตัว (ติดกระดุมแขนเสื้อ) + รองเท้านิรภัย + แว่นนิรภัย
ppe.content_id: Pakaian kerja pas badan (kancing lengan terpasang) + sepatu pengaman + kacamata pengaman
